# LoL Custom Game Helper - Node.js/React Project

This is a modern web application built with:
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14 with React 18 and TypeScript
- **Backend**: Node.js with Express and TypeScript  
- **Database**: SQLite with Drizzle ORM
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Architecture**: Full-stack web application

## Project Status: ✅ COMPLETED
- [x] Converted from C# Avalonia to Node.js/React ✅ COMPLETED
- [x] Full-stack web application with frontend and backend ✅ COMPLETED
- [x] LoL-themed UI with team/role/champion randomization ✅ COMPLETED
- [x] Multiple selection methods (wheel spinner, captain draft, random) ✅ COMPLETED
- [x] Match history and player statistics ✅ COMPLETED
- [x] Clean project structure with no C# dependencies ✅ COMPLETED
- [x] Working startup scripts and development environment ✅ COMPLETED

## Development Notes
- Use `npm run dev` to start both frontend and backend servers
- Frontend runs on http://localhost:3000
- Backend API runs on http://localhost:3001
- Database is SQLite with Drizzle ORM for type safety
